arts.ttl: Juventus dreaming of third as they face Lecce
arts.sum: Juventus have lost only four of their 37 matches (W24 D9) against Lecce in Serie A; however, three of these defeats for the Bianconeri have come in the second half of the season, including the two most recent defeats, in February 2011 (0-2 away) and April 2004 (3-4 at home). Juventus have won five of their last six Serie A games (L1) played at the Allianz Stadium – as many wins as the Bianconeri had in their previous 16 home matches (D11) – keeping a clean sheet in four of these: in this period (since the beginning of 2025), no team has kept more clean sheets at home than the Piedmontese in the tournament (Fiorentina and Genoa have also kept four).
